note: Portal app catalog. Host this file on a public URL (e.g. GitHub raw) and point the store's CATALOG_URL at it. Entries with source 'fdroid' resolve the current APK at install time via the F-Droid API, so they never go stale. Entries with source 'url' use a direct apkUrl (use this for your own custom Portal apps). Multi-ABI apps (e.g. VLC) ship separate per-architecture APKs on F-Droid; pin the arm64-v8a build with 'versionCode' since Portal is arm64.

apps.name: VLC
apps.description: Plays virtually any video or audio file or network stream.

apps.name: Jellyfin
apps.description: Client for your own Jellyfin media server — movies, shows, music.

apps.name: SmartTube
apps.description: Ad-free YouTube built for the big screen — ideal for Portal TV.

apps.name: Transistor
apps.description: Simple internet radio — add stations by stream URL.

apps.name: Home Assistant
apps.description: Control your smart home dashboard. No-GMS minimal build.

apps.name: Breezy Weather
apps.description: Clean, detailed weather with multiple data sources.

apps.name: Tasks.org
apps.description: To-do lists and reminders with optional sync.

apps.name: Markor
apps.description: Fast, offline notes and to-do in plain text / Markdown.

apps.name: Feeder
apps.description: A clean RSS reader — turn the Portal into a news board.

apps.name: Aurora Store
apps.description: Install Play Store apps anonymously — no Google account or GMS. On a Gen-1 Portal, pair with Shizuku (set Aurora's installer to Shizuku) so installs work.

apps.name: Shizuku
apps.description: Lets apps like Aurora install silently on a Gen-1 Portal. After installing, run the kit's --shizuku step to start it (re-run after a reboot).

apps.name: Fossify Gallery
apps.description: Browse local photos and videos, no ads.

apps.name: Termux
apps.description: A full Linux terminal environment on the device.

apps.name: Immortal
apps.description: The Immortal launcher, screensaver, and app store — the project itself.
